title: cyclosorus distinctus
intro: Cyclosorus distinctus, also known as the distinct fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus distinctus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves or roots in water or a solvent like ethanol.
